name: growthify
description: Generative-first growth framework for the team — turns a metric problem or a design surface into a ranked, evidence-grounded portfolio of growth, gamification, and game-theory mechanics, then deepens the winners into ship-ready experiment designs. The generative sibling in the wargame family (wargame, spar, campaign-wargame): externalized lens packs, role-separated generation, an anti-sycophancy judge gate, and blind calibration. Built for the team — no coding required.
